title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at SRL Diagnostics

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at SRL Diagnostics
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? SRL Diagnostics in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SRL Diagnostics:
SRL Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics!
